Python : Http Server Transfer File Linux - Android

Final | 13 Oct 2020

Cek IP

ifconfig | more

Buat Server

pindah ke directory yang akan di jadikan server

cd /home/user/

Python 2

python -m SimpleHTTPServer 8000

Paython 3

python3 -m http.server 8000

Penggunaan

http://[IP SERVER]:8000

ex

http://192.168.100.1:8000

Referensi

  • https://docs.python.org/2/library/simplehttpserver.html
Final Afriola 2023
